tools.name: gluecron_repo_search
tools.description: Search public Gluecron repositories by keyword. Matches against name + description. Returns up to 20 results.

tools.name: gluecron_repo_read_file
tools.description: Read a single file from a public repository at a given ref (branch / tag / commit). Returns the text content (binary files rejected).

tools.name: gluecron_repo_list_issues
tools.description: List open issues for a public repository. Returns up to 50 ordered by most-recent.

tools.name: gluecron_repo_explain_codebase
tools.description: Return the cached AI 'explain this codebase' Markdown for a public repo (most recent commit). Returns null when no cached explanation exists yet.

tools.name: gluecron_repo_health
tools.description: Compute the current health report for a public repo: overall score (0-100), letter grade, per-category breakdown (security/testing/complexity/dependencies/documentation/activity), and a list of insights to fix next. Backed by computeHealthScore in src/lib/intelligence.ts.

tools.name: gluecron_create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue on a Gluecron repository. Requires authenticated caller with write access on the target repo. Returns {number, url}.

tools.name: gluecron_comment_issue
tools.description: Add a comment to an existing issue. Requires authenticated caller with write access. Returns {commentId}.

tools.name: gluecron_close_issue
tools.description: Close an open issue. Requires authenticated caller with write access. Idempotent — closing an already-closed issue is a no-op. Returns {state}.

tools.name: gluecron_reopen_issue
tools.description: Reopen a previously closed issue. Requires authenticated caller with write access. Idempotent. Returns {state}.

tools.name: gluecron_create_pr
tools.description: Open a new pull request. `head_branch` is required; `base_branch` defaults to the repo default branch. Requires authenticated caller with write access. Returns {number, url}.

tools.name: gluecron_get_pr
tools.description: Fetch the full detail record of a pull request (title, body, state, branches, draft, author, timestamps). Authenticated callers only (the read tool surface still works anonymously).

tools.name: gluecron_list_prs
tools.description: List pull requests on a repo, filtered by state (open|closed|merged|all). Authenticated callers only. Returns up to 50 summary rows.

tools.name: gluecron_comment_pr
tools.description: Add a comment to a pull request. Requires authenticated caller with write access. Returns {commentId}.

tools.name: gluecron_merge_pr
tools.description: Merge an open PR. Enforces the same checks as the HTTP merge flow: not a draft, head SHA resolves, GateTest+AI-review hard gates pass, branch-protection rules satisfied. M3: soft-blocks when the pre-merge risk score is `critical` unless `confirm_high_risk: true` is passed. Returns {merged, sha?, rea

tools.name: gluecron_close_pr
tools.description: Close an open pull request without merging. Requires authenticated caller with write access. Idempotent. Returns {state}.

tools.name: gluecron_fork_repo
tools.description: Fork a repository to the authenticated caller's namespace. Mirrors POST /:owner/:repo/fork. Returns {owner, repo, url}. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_delete_repo
tools.description: Permanently delete a repository row (git data on disk is left untouched). Owner-only. Requires 'admin' scope. Returns {deleted: true}.

tools.name: gluecron_update_repo
tools.description: Update repository description / visibility / default_branch. Owner-only. Requires 'repo' scope. Returns {ok: true}.

tools.name: gluecron_search_repos
tools.description: Full-text search of public repositories by name/description. Mirrors GET /api/v2/search/repos. Returns ranked rows.

tools.name: gluecron_clone_url
tools.description: Return the authenticated HTTPS clone URL for a repo + a credential-helper hint. Use this instead of embedding tokens in URLs. Returns {url, hint}.

tools.name: gluecron_label_issue
tools.description: Attach one or more labels to an issue. Labels are created if they don't yet exist on the repo. Requires 'repo' scope. Returns {labels}.

tools.name: gluecron_unlabel_issue
tools.description: Detach a label from an issue. Idempotent. Requires 'repo' scope. Returns {removed: boolean}.

tools.name: gluecron_assign_issue
tools.description: Assign an issue to a user. Gluecron does not yet have a dedicated assignee table; assignment is modelled as an `assignee:<username>` label so it integrates with existing label tooling. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_search_issues
tools.description: Search issues by title/body keyword on a single repo, filtered by state. Returns ranked rows.

tools.name: gluecron_request_changes
tools.description: Post a 'changes requested' AI-review comment on a PR. The comment is tagged with isAiReview=true so the gate-checker recognises it. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_search_prs
tools.description: Search pull requests by title/body keyword on a repo.

tools.name: gluecron_open_draft_pr
tools.description: Open a draft pull request. Same payload as gluecron_create_pr but forces is_draft=true. Useful for AI-in-progress PRs that shouldn't run mergeability checks yet.

tools.name: gluecron_generate_pr_description
tools.description: Generate an AI commit-message-style description for a diff. Uses src/lib/ai-commit-message.ts under the hood; gracefully degrades to a heuristic when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is missing. Returns {subject, body}.

tools.name: gluecron_read_file
tools.description: Read a file from a repo at a given ref. Mirrors GET /api/v2/repos/:owner/:repo/contents/:path. Returns {path, size, content, encoding}.

tools.name: gluecron_write_file
tools.description: Create or update a file on a branch via git plumbing. Wraps `createOrUpdateFileOnBranch`. Pass `content` as a UTF-8 string OR `content_base64` for binary. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file from a branch via git plumbing. Requires the existing blob sha (optimistic concurrency) and 'repo' scope. Mirrors DELETE /api/v2/contents.

tools.name: gluecron_list_tree
tools.description: List directory contents at a ref. Optionally `recursive: true` returns the full file list. Mirrors GET /api/v2/repos/.../tree/:ref.

tools.name: gluecron_get_commit
tools.description: Fetch a single commit's metadata by SHA. Mirrors GET /api/v2/repos/.../commits/:sha.

tools.name: gluecron_create_branch
tools.description: Create a new branch ref pointing at an existing sha. Mirrors POST /api/v2/repos/.../git/refs. Requires 'repo' scope. Returns {ref, sha}.

tools.name: gluecron_atomic_multi_file_commit
tools.description: Apply a set of file writes + deletes as a single atomic commit on a branch (creates the branch if it doesn't exist). The killer agent tool: blob/tree/commit/ref-update sequence. Each change is `{path, content?, content_base64?, deleted?}`. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_ship_spec
tools.description: Drop a spec file in .gluecron/specs/ with status: ready so the autopilot picks it up. Wraps voice-to-pr.shipAsSpec — handle both voice + manual specs. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_voice_to_pr
tools.description: Interpret a free-form voice transcript and either ship it as a spec or create an issue (caller picks via `as`). Wraps src/lib/voice-to-pr.ts. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_refactor_across_repos
tools.description: Plan + execute a refactor that spans multiple repos owned by the caller. Wraps src/lib/multi-repo-refactor.ts. `dry_run: true` returns the plan only. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_explain_repo
tools.description: Return the cached AI 'explain this codebase' Markdown for a repo. Pure read — never triggers a new generation (use the web UI for that).

tools.name: gluecron_chat_with_repo
tools.description: Start a new chat with a repo: creates a chat row, sends the first user message, streams + persists the assistant reply. Returns {chat_id, reply}. Requires authentication.

tools.name: gluecron_chat_continue
tools.description: Send another message to an existing repo chat. Returns the assistant's reply.

tools.name: gluecron_generate_tests
tools.description: Generate tests for a PR via Claude. Wraps src/lib/ai-test-generator.generateTestsForPr. Mode 'follow-up-pr' opens a new PR; 'append-commit' commits onto the head branch. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_generate_commit_message
tools.description: Generate a commit message for a diff. Same engine as gluecron_generate_pr_description but explicit for the commit-message use case.

tools.name: gluecron_generate_release_notes
tools.description: Generate release notes between two tags. Wraps src/lib/ai-release-notes.generateReleaseNotes. Returns the rendered Markdown + section data.

tools.name: gluecron_propose_migration
tools.description: Propose a dependency-upgrade PR. Wraps src/lib/migration-assistant.proposeMajorMigration. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_propose_doc_update
tools.description: Manual trigger for the AI doc-update flow: scans tracked sections on the default branch and opens a PR rewriting stale prose. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_trigger_workflow
tools.description: Dispatch a workflow_dispatch run. Mirrors POST /api/v2/repos/.../actions/workflows/:filename/dispatches. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_get_workflow_run
tools.description: Fetch a workflow run's metadata + status. Mirrors GET /api/v2/repos/.../actions/runs/:id.

tools.name: gluecron_get_workflow_logs
tools.description: Return concatenated per-job logs for a workflow run, plus per-job metadata. JSON-friendly companion to the ZIP-download endpoint.

tools.name: gluecron_cancel_workflow_run
tools.description: Cancel a queued/running workflow run. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_get_preview_url
tools.description: Return the branch-preview URL + status for a (repo, branch) pair. Wraps branch-previews.getPreviewForBranch.

tools.name: gluecron_provision_pr_sandbox
tools.description: Provision (or re-provision) a sandbox for a PR. Wraps pr-sandbox.provisionSandbox. Requires 'repo' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_create_agent_session
tools.description: Mint a new agent-multiplayer session. Returns the plaintext `token` exactly once (store it). Requires 'admin' scope.

tools.name: gluecron_acquire_lease
tools.description: Grab an exclusive lease on a target (e.g. a PR or branch) for an agent session. Returns null when another agent holds an active lease.

tools.name: gluecron_release_lease
tools.description: Release a lease by id. Idempotent. Returns {released}.

tools.name: gluecron_get_agent_budget
tools.description: Return spent / cap / remaining cents for an agent session.

tools.name: gluecron_semantic_search
tools.description: Query the per-repo vector index (Voyage embeddings when configured, hash fallback otherwise). Wraps src/lib/semantic-search.searchRepository.

tools.name: gluecron_find_symbol
tools.description: Find definitions of a symbol by name within a repo. Wraps src/lib/symbols.findDefinitions.

tools.name: gluecron_pr_status_summary
tools.description: Compute a one-shot status summary for a PR: state, risk score, AI-review verdicts (trio), gate signals. Read-only.

tools.name: gluecron_ai_cost_summary
tools.description: Return AI spend rollups. Scope by one of: user_id (self), repo {owner,repo}, or agent_session_id. Defaults to caller's user spend.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "gluecron_generate_pr_description" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Generate an AI commit-message-style description for a diff. Uses src/lib/ai-commit-message.ts under the hood; gracefully degrades to a heuristic when ANTHROPIC_…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: gluecron_repo_list_issues, gluecron_close_issue, gluecron_create_pr, gluecron_get_pr, gluecron_list_prs, gluecron_merge_pr, gluecron_close_pr, gluecron_search_issues, gluecron_search_prs, gluecron_open_draft_pr, gluecron_get_preview_url, gluecron_pr_status_summary · Private data: gluecron_repo_read_file, gluecron_get_pr, gluecron_clone_url, gluecron_read_file, gluecron_write_file, gluecron_delete_file, gluecron_list_tree, gluecron_atomic_multi_file_commit, gluecron_ship_spec, gluecron_create_agent_session · Public sink: gluecron_create_issue, gluecron_create_pr, gluecron_fork_repo, gluecron_request_changes, gluecron_create_branch, gluecron_chat_continue, gluecron_trigger_workflow · Destructive: gluecron_delete_repo, gluecron_open_draft_pr, gluecron_delete_file, gluecron_ship_spec, gluecron_refactor_across_repos, gluecron_trigger_workflow, gluecron_get_workflow_run, gluecron_get_workflow_logs, gluecron_cancel_workflow_run.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: gluecron_repo_list_issues, gluecron_close_issue, gluecron_create_pr, gluecron_get_pr, gluecron_list_prs, gluecron_merge_pr, gluecron_close_pr, gluecron_search_issues, gluecron_search_prs, gluecron_open_draft_pr, gluecron_get_preview_url, gluecron_pr_status_summary · Private data: gluecron_repo_read_file, gluecron_get_pr, gluecron_clone_url, gluecron_read_file, gluecron_write_file, gluecron_delete_file, gluecron_list_tree, gluecron_atomic_multi_file_commit, gluecron_ship_spec, gluecron_create_agent_session · Public sink: gluecron_create_issue, gluecron_create_pr, gluecron_fork_repo, gluecron_request_changes, gluecron_create_branch, gluecron_chat_continue, gluecron_trigger_workflow · Destructive: gluecron_delete_repo, gluecron_open_draft_pr, gluecron_delete_file, gluecron_ship_spec, gluecron_refactor_across_repos, gluecron_trigger_workflow, gluecron_get_workflow_run, gluecron_get_workflow_logs, gluecron_cancel_workflow_run

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
